factionAbilities.name: TERRAGENESIS
factionAbilities.effect: After you explore a planet that does not have a sleeper token, you may place or move 1 sleeper token onto that planet.

factionAbilities.name: AWAKEN
factionAbilities.effect: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your sleeper tokens, you may replace each of those tokens with 1 PDS from your reinforcements.

factionAbilities.name: COALESCENCE
factionAbilities.effect: If your flagship or your AWAKEN faction ability places your units into the same space area or onto the same planet as another player's units, your units must participate in combat during "Space Combat" or "Ground Combat" steps.

versions.timing: ACTION: Attach this card to a non-home planet you control other than Mecatol Rex.
versions.effect: Its resource and influence values are each increased by 1 and it is treated as having all 3 planet traits (Cultural, Hazardous, and Industrial).

factionComponents.name: Sleeper Token
factionComponents.description: Placed on planets using the Titans of Ul's Terragenesis faction ability. Can be turned into a PDS at a later point using the Awaken faction ability.

factionComponents.name: Terraform Token
factionComponents.description: Used to mark a planet on the game board that has the Titans of Ul's faction promissory note attached to it.

factionComponents.name: Geoform Token
factionComponents.description: Used to mark a planet on the game board that has the Titans of Ul's hero card attached to it.

cruiser.name: Saturn Engine
cruiser.note: Titans of Ul Cruisers start with capacity and when upgraded gain the Sustain Damage ability.

pds.name: Hel-Titan
pds.note: Titans of Ul PDS can participate in Ground Combat and have a Production value.

abilities.name: Structure and Ground Force
abilities.effect: This unit is treated as both a structure and a ground force. It cannot be transported.

abilities.name: Structure and Ground Force
abilities.effect: This unit is treated as both a structure and a ground force. It cannot be transported.

abilities.name: Space Cannon vs Adjacent
abilities.effect: You may use this unit's SPACE CANNON against ships that are adjacent to this unit's system.

abilities.name: DEPLOY
abilities.effect: DEPLOY: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your PDS, you may replace 1 of those PDS with this unit.

abilities.name: DEPLOY
abilities.effect: DEPLOY: When you would place a PDS on a planet, you may place 1 mech and 1 infantry on that planet instead.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías verdes pueden usarse como amarillas para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Slumberstate Computing
ability.effect: When COALESCENCE results in a ground combat, if you commit no other units, you may choose for your units to coexist instead. During the status phase, for each player you are coexisting with, you and that player each draw 1 additional action card. Other players may allow you to place a sleeper token on a planet they control.

agent.name: Tellurian
agent.ability: When a hit is produced against a unit: You may exhaust this card to cancel that hit.

commander.name: Tungstantus
commander.unlock: Have 5 structures on the game board.
commander.ability: When 1 or more of your units use PRODUCTION: You may gain 1 trade good.

hero.name: Ul The Progenitor
hero.ability: "GEOFORM" — ACTION: Ready Elysium and attach this card to it. Its resource and influence values are each increased by 3, and it gains the SPACE CANNON 5 (x3) ability as if it were a unit.
